resources.string: Allows the application to implement reminders for upcoming buses.
Sorry, there was a communication error and we can\'t show this information. Try again and it might work.
Sorry, that particular route can\'t be found. If this was a shortcut, it\'s possible your link is out of date, or a region hasn\'t been selected yet (Change in \"Preferences->Your region\").

Sorry, that particular route can\'t be found. If this was a shortcut, it\'s possible your link is out of date, or the wrong region is selected (Your current region is %1$s. Change in \"Preferences->Your region\").
Sorry, that particular stop can\'t be found. If this was a shortcut, it\'s possible your link is out of date, or a region hasn\'t been selected yet (Change in \"Preferences->Your region\").

Sorry, that particular stop can\'t be found. If this was a shortcut, it\'s possible your link is out of date, or the wrong region is selected (Your current region is %1$s. Change in \"Preferences->Your region\").
Oops, something went wrong. Please check your Internet connection and try again.
Sorry, there isn\'t enough available memory to handle that request.
%1$s\'s servers are overloaded. Please excuse us!
You appear to be offline or are not connected to the network.
You are not connected to the network.\nTurn off Airplane Mode?
Invalid URL. Please enter a working %1$s server.
Invalid URL. Please enter a working OpenTripPlanner server.
• Bug fixes Several bug fixes and fit and finish improvements. - See https://bit.ly/oba-android-releases
Gray means \"Scheduled arrival\" - We don\'t know where the bus is now, but the schedule says there is an upcoming arrival
Gray with strikethrough means the trip has been canceled - this bus is NOT coming
%1$s would like your location, do you want to enable it now?
Trying to get a fix on your location…
Unable to get your location. Please give app location permissions via system settings.
You\'re looking at a place outside the %1$s service area.\n\nMove map to %1$s now?
No arrivals in the next %1$d min.

plurals.name: stop_info_nodata_hours_minutes
plurals.item: No arrivals in the next 1 hour and %1$d min.
No arrivals in the next %2$d hours and %1$d min.

resources.string: No additional arrivals in the next %1$d min.

plurals.name: stop_info_no_additional_data_hours_minutes
plurals.item: No additional arrivals in the next 1 hr and %1$d min.
No additional arrivals in the next %2$d hrs and %1$d min.

resources.string: Sliding panel collapsed. Tap to expand and show detailed arrivals list, or press Back button to hide.
Would you like to be notified when you are approaching this stop?
Destination reminders rely on GPS, which is not always reliable and will not work indoors, underground, or in areas without a clear view of the sky. Always be aware of your surroundings.
Were you notified at the right time?
Were you notified at the right time to exit at your stop?
Include system log (your choice will be saved for future trips)
Yes, I was notified at the right time
No, I was not notified at the right time

Your feedback will be sent to %1$s. If you check \"Include system logs\", real-time location information from your device recorded as you approached your destination stop will be shared with %1$s so developers can improve the destination reminder feature.\n\nChange your preference for sharing system logs in Settings.
Anonymous real-time location information from your device will be shared with %1$s to improve the destination reminder feature.

Your current device "Location method" setting may fail to notify you when approaching your destination due to inaccurate position information. Would you like to change your device "Location method" to "High accuracy" now?
Sorry, map information isn\'t available for this route
You have no starred stops.\n\nYou can add a star to a stop on the arrivals screen by tapping on the star next to the stop name.
You have no starred routes.\n\nYou can add a star to a route on the arrivals screen by tapping on the star next to the route number.
This will permanently delete all recent stops.
This will permanently delete all recent routes.
This will permanently remove all starred stops.
This will permanently remove all starred routes.
Find a stop by entering its stop number in the search box.\n\nThe stop number is 3 to 5 digits and can be found on the stop signpost or shelter.
Find a route by entering its route name or number in the search box.
There are no results that match your search.
You don\'t have any reminders.\n\nYou can create reminders by tapping on an arriving bus at your stop.
Your reports help %1$s find and fix problems!
Unable to send the report. Try again?
Disabled automatic region selection. You can enable in Preferences.

Complaints, kudos, or bug reports are welcome!


App Version: %1$s
Model: %2$s
OS Version: %3$s / %4$d
Google Play Services App: %5$s
 Google Play Services Library: %6$d
Region/API: %7$s (%8$s)
Loc: %9$s

Complaints, kudos, or bug reports are welcome!


App Version: %1$s
Model: %2$s
OS Version: %3$s / %4$d
Unable to send the bug report: no suitable application found.

Complaints, kudos, or bug reports are welcome!


App Version: %1$s
Model: %2$s
OS Version: %3$s / %4$d
Google Play Services App: %5$s
 Google Play Services Library: %6$d
Region/API: %7$s (%8$s)
Loc: %9$s

 Unable to plan trip using URL: %10$s

Complaints, kudos, or bug reports are welcome!


App Version: %1$s
Model: %2$s
OS Version: %3$s / %4$d
Google Play Services App: %5$s
 Google Play Services Library: %6$d
Region/API: %7$s (%8$s)
Loc: %9$s

 Planning trip using URL: %10$s

Complaints, kudos, or bug reports are welcome!


App Version: %1$s
Model: %2$s
OS Version: %3$s / %4$d

Planning trip using URL: %5$s

Complaints, kudos, or bug reports are welcome!


App Version: %1$s
Model: %2$s
OS Version: %3$s / %4$d

Unable to plan trip using URL: %5$s
Your device doesn\'t have the Play Store installed. Please find another way to install Google Maps.
Dig deeper into the nuts and bolts
A custom API server is being used
Set your current transit region based on your current location
Include buses that just left as negative arrival times
When selected, by default all service alerts will be collapsed into a small bar at the top of the arrivals screen instead of shown as a full list.
When viewing starred stops, show arrival info in the header at the top of the screen (doesn\'t affect map view)
After planning a trip, send notifications if the trip is delayed or no longer recommended.
Display informational popups explaining how to use features
Flips placement of some buttons to the left side of the screen
Determines the server used in OpenTripPlanner API calls
Determines the server used in %1$s API calls
Saves your starred and recent stops and routes

Restores from a previous backup. After selecting this option, you\'ll be asked to pick a file. Please select the backup file (e.g., "db.backup" or "%1$s.backup"), which may be in your "Documents" folder or any location where you saved the backup.
This will wipe out any existing data! Go ahead?
Enables regions that may be unstable
Experimental regions may be unstable and without real-time info! Go ahead?
Your current experimental region won\'t be available! Go ahead?
Show instructions for using this app
Find out more about the open-source project

If you\'ve opted into a travel behavior study, tapping this option will trigger a push of collected travel behavior data to the Firebase server. This is useful while testing the app and is intended for use by developers. For best results make sure you have a strong Internet connection first.
Waiting until all currently pending writes for the active user have been acknowledged by the backend…
Push to Firebase was not attempted as user is not enrolled in travel behavior data collection. You can enroll by enabling the Setting for \"Send anonymous travel behavior data\".
All currently pending writes for the active user have been acknowledged by the Firebase backend.
Something went wrong. Please make sure you have a strong Internet connection and try again.
Something went wrong. Please make sure you have a strong Internet connection and try again.
Your region is currently set to %1$s. If we got this wrong, please tap on \'Your Region\' to change it!
Please tap on stop on map
Address not found. Please check your address.
Image couldn\'t be resized - using full size.
No arrival times, please check back later.
An error occurred during submission, please try again later.
Driver compliments and complaints, lost & found, etc.
Missing route, wrong stop name, etc.
Vehicle never came, wrong arrival time, etc.
Estimate from data updated %1$d sec ago
Estimate from data updated %1$d min %2$d sec ago
Never miss the bus at night again!

Tired of watching your bus fly by because the driver couldn\'t see you in the dark? Hold up your flashing Night Light and make yourself visible! \n\nWARNING: This feature may potentially trigger seizures for people with photosensitive epilepsy. User discretion is advised.
Tap on a stop (green dot on the map) to see arrival times.
Would you like to see popup descriptions for how to use %1$s? You can always turn the popups on or off in Settings, or show the tutorial later via Help.
How long until your bus arrives?

This long! Colored background tells you if the bus is early (red) or late (blue). On time = green background. If we don\'t know where the bus is, the scheduled time is shown (gray background). Gray with strikethrough text (a line through it) means the trip is canceled.
Slide up to show more arrivals
Tap on the arrow or drag the panel up to see more arrivals for this stop.
Tap on the star to pin your favorite routes to the top of the sliding panel.
Find the stops and routes that you\'ve recently looked at via the \"More\" button at the top right of the screen.
Tap a green dot like this one on the map to see its arrival times.

To enhance your experience, enable location use to:
- Display your real-time position on the map.
- Automatically set your local transit agency.

Your location data is not collected by us. Alternatively, you may manually select your region without enabling location permissions.
%1$s is made by a team of volunteers and relies upon the dedication, passion, and talents of its open source contributors.
Our dedicated contributors improve the app\'s functionality and user experience:
Thanks to our translators, %1$s is accessible worldwide:
Thanks to the designers who created images used in the vehicle icons, which were uploaded to the Noun Project under CC BY 3.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/us/):
Join the Journey: Contribute to Our App!
Check out our project on GitHub at https://github.com/OneBusAway/onebusaway-android.
Find out more about the %1$s open-source project at https://onebusaway.org.

Special thanks to Google for the visually stunning material design icons (https://github.com/google/material-design-icons), which add a touch of elegance to our app. Their generosity in licensing these icons under Apache v2.0 (https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0) has greatly enriched our user experience.

Special thanks to amcharts for free SVG weather icons (https://www.amcharts.com/free-animated-svg-weather-icons/), these icons under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
Explore our app and embark on a seamless transit journey with %1$s!

string-array.name: about_code_contributors
string-array.item: Hillsborough Area Regional Transit (via Simon Jacobs at Cambridge Systematics)

string-array.name: about_image_credits
string-array.item: Map Marker by Housin Aziz, SE

resources.string: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
Please check your Internet connection and try again.
Please check your Internet connection and try again.
Origin or destination is outside transportation network coverage
Couldn\'t find a matching route between origin and destination
Transit times for selected date are not available
Something went wrong. Change your trip options and try again.
Something went wrong. Change your bike options and try again
There is no trip planning contact for this region.
We found a better trip plan
Tap to see new results for your last origin/destination.
This app is currently built with 100% volunteer labor, and we need you to help us fund future development.
%1$s is a volunteer-run organization with almost no funding. We need your help to keep this app running.

We have big plans to improve %1$s, but we can't do it without your help. This app is currently built with 100%% volunteer labor, and we need you to help us fund future development.

As a key project of the Open Transit Software Foundation, a 501(c)(3) non-profit, we rely on the goodwill of users like you to keep running and making this software better.

Every year, only a small fraction of our users donate, but every contribution, big or small, helps ensure that %1$s remains free, updated, and accessible to everyone. A small donation, even just the cost of one week of commuting, $27.50, can make all the difference.

Your tax-deductible contribution ensures that %1$s remains free and accessible for everyone. Let's shape the future of transit together!

Thank you,
The %1$s Team
Tapping this option will clear both the \'Remind Me Later\' and \'Don\'t Bother Me\' timestamps associated with donation requests.
Join studies to help improve your transit and app experience.
(You can select multiple options for this pool.)
Your feedback helps improve transit services and app experiences.
Display the weather view on the map
No agencies found for the current region.
